info.title: AeroXe Bee API
info.description: Distributed SMS gateway platform with delivery confidence scoring and AI-powered template generation.

tags.name: Messages
tags.description: SMS message sending, bulk, scheduling, and retrieval

tags.name: Devices
tags.description: Physical device registration, login, and management

tags.name: Account
tags.description: Account profile, API keys, subscription, and usage

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description: Webhook endpoint configuration and delivery logs

tags.name: Billing
tags.description: Plans, billing settings, invoices, and usage

tags.name: Payment Requests
tags.description: Payment and recharge request maker-checker flow

tags.name: App Releases
tags.description: App version management, in-app updates, and maker-checker release flow

tags.name: Firebase Config
tags.description: Firebase Remote Config key-value management for feature flags and app settings

tags.name: AI Config
tags.description: AI provider configuration and template generation

tags.name: Feature Catalog
tags.description: Global feature catalog for plan features

device_id.description: Optional device ID for pinning to a specific device

post.summary: Bulk send SMS to multiple recipients
Schedule a message for future delivery

get.summary: Get delivery confidence for a message

message.description: Optional custom template. Default: 'Your OTP is {{otp}}'

200.description: Login successful, returns JWT + MQTT credentials

post.summary: Register multi-layer device fingerprint for anti-clone protection

fingerprint_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the composite device fingerprint

signature.description: RSA+SHA256 signature of fingerprint_hash, signed by Android Keystore

public_key.description: Base64-encoded RSA public key from Android Keystore

integrity_token.description: Play Integrity API token for anti-tamper verification

409.description: Fingerprint already registered to another account

post.summary: Report SIM rotation events for fraud detection

200.description: Test result with status code and body

201.description: Change request submitted, pending admin review

200.description: Request approved and plan change applied
Daily and monthly usage with overage
Platform statistics (accounts, devices, messages, queue depth)
Consolidated dashboard (account, devices, messages, usage, subscription)
Devices with name, phone, carrier, online status

device_id.description: Must belong to the member and be online

403.description: Device does not belong to account

get.summary: Get current plan and quota details

200.description: Plan details with usage and quota info

403.description: Account suspended/disabled or subscription canceled/past due

200.description: Daily usage, device count, plan info

post.summary: Create a new app release draft
Upload APK file for a release

400.description: File too large or not an APK

put.summary: Bulk update Firebase config entries (admin only)
Upsert a single config entry (admin only)

200.description: List of AI provider configs (API keys masked)

post.summary: Create an AI provider config (admin creates directly, staff submits change request)

201.description: Config created (admin) or change request submitted (staff/viewer)

get.summary: Get AI provider config by ID

200.description: Config updated (admin) or change request submitted (staff/viewer)
Config deleted or change request submitted

post.summary: Approve an AI config change request (admin only)

200.description: Request approved and config change applied

post.summary: Reject an AI config change request (admin only)
Generate an SMS template using AI
post.description: Uses the active AI provider to generate an SMS template from a natural language prompt. Returns a template name, body (with {{variable}} placeholders), and detected variables.

prompt.example: A welcome message for new users with their name and account ID

context.description: Optional existing template body to refine

400.description: No active AI config or invalid prompt

get.summary: List all templates with account info (admin)

APIKeyAuth.name: Authorization
APIKeyAuth.description: API key passed as Bearer token.

AdminAuth.description: Admin/staff JWT token with admin claim.

AIConfigResponse.description: AI provider config (API key masked in responses)

has_api_key.description: Whether an API key is stored

AIChangeRequest.description: Maker-checker change request for AI config modifications
